relatedness_reasoning: Both files involve the same customer entity and flow between risk_and_compliance and credit systems; the inbound credit_score_result contains risk_indicators that would trigger sanctions screening, and the outbound sanctions_list_hit represents the compliance response back to credit.

mappings.reasoning: System-generated unique identifier for the outbound message; no source in inbound.
Both are ISO 8601 timestamps; outbound likely generated at processing time but semantically related to inbound assessment time.
Inbound destination_department is 'risk_and_compliance', which becomes the source of the outbound message.
Inbound source_department is 'credit', which becomes the destination of the outbound message.
Unique identifier for the sanctions match event; generated by screening system, not present in inbound.
Inbound compliance_flags may indicate severity, but no direct severity enum mapping exists; low confidence.
Workflow status of the sanctions hit review; not derivable from inbound credit assessment data.
Customer identifier from inbound becomes the matched entity identifier in outbound.
Entity type classification (INDIVIDUAL) not explicitly stated in inbound; would require external knowledge.
Customer name field directly maps to matched entity name.
Customer date_of_birth maps to matched entity dateOfBirth with camelCase naming convention change.
Nationality information not present in inbound credit_score_result schema.
Identification documents array not present in inbound; would be sourced from external KYC systems.
Sanctions list matching results generated by external screening engine, not derivable from inbound.
Inbound risk_indicators object contains fraud_risk, compliance_flags, and regulatory_concerns that could inform risk factors.
Inbound account_number becomes part of associated accounts array; transformation from single field to array structure.
Customer account_number (IBAN format) maps to accountNumber in associated accounts.
Account type classification not present in inbound credit_score_result.
Currency information not present in inbound schema.
Account operational status not present in inbound; determined by compliance system.
Inbound reviewed_by identifier could inform compliance review assignment, but not a direct mapping.
Review deadline determined by compliance workflow policy, not derivable from inbound.
Free-text compliance notes generated during review process, not present in inbound.
Required actions determined by compliance policy and sanctions hit severity, not in inbound.
Detection timestamp generated by screening engine at time of match, not in inbound.
Detection method (AUTOMATED_SCREENING) determined by screening system configuration, not in inbound.
Screening engine identifier determined by compliance infrastructure, not in inbound.
